data.body: Live validation kicked off as a dispatchable CI job: .github/workflows/llm-live.yml (workflow_dispatch) installs .[dev] and runs pytest -m integration tests/interfaces/test_llm_live.py with the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (or OPENAI_API_KEY) repo secret; it FAILS loudly if no key secret is set (so a no-key dispatch cant masquerade as a pass). Optional LANGFUSE_* secrets exercise tracing. Readiness verified in-session (no API call): the agent assembles for claude-opus-4-8, egress is open, live tests collect. TO COMPLETE: add the repo secret and trigger the workflow (Actions tab); this sandbox has no key so the actual run happens there.
